task_completion.description: Verify that 'Telehealth' has been added as a supported visit type in the system settings or configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a settings, administration, or configuration screen showing 'Telehealth' in the list of available visit types.

task_completion.description: Verify that Lars Jensen is selected as the patient for a new appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an appointment creation form or scheduling dialog where the patient name 'Lars Jensen' is entered or selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Telehealth' is selected as the visit type for the appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or field in the appointment form where the visit type is set to 'Telehealth'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the appointment date is set to October 15, 2025, and the time is set to 10:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for date and time fields in the appointment form showing '10/15/2025' (or similar format for October 15, 2025) and '10:00 AM'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the appointment was successfully scheduled and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a calendar view showing the appointment on October 15, 2025 at 10:00 AM, a success notification, or an appointment summary page confirming the scheduled Telehealth visit for Lars Jensen.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the application's graphical user interface to add the new visit type.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the application's settings menus, not terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the application's graphical user interface to schedule the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the appointment form being filled out and submitted within the application.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply type the expected outcomes into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visible windows should be the actual medical/scheduling software, not Notepad, text editors, or terminal echoes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target patient is 'Lars Jensen'. The target visit type must be 'Telehealth'. The appointment date must be '2025-10-15' (October 15, 2025) and the time must be '10:00 AM'.
